hooks.description: Activates frontend-dev engine when the task involves UI, frontend, React, CSS, Tailwind, responsive design, accessibility, or component architecture.

actions.message: frontend-dev engine active. Lumina standing by for UI architecture decisions.

hooks.description: Verifies design quality, accessibility compliance, and responsive integrity before finalizing frontend output.

checks.rule: All generated markup uses semantic HTML5 elements (nav, main, section, article, aside, header, footer). No div-soup.
Interactive elements have visible focus indicators. Images have alt text. Forms have associated labels. Color is never the sole information carrier.
Spacing values follow the 4pt/8pt grid system. No arbitrary pixel values (13px, 7px, 22px). Tailwind spacing utilities preferred.
Components handle mobile (320px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1280px) viewports. No horizontal overflow at any breakpoint.
Business logic lives in hooks or server actions. Render components are pure presentation. No fetch calls inside JSX.
Transitions use 150-300ms duration with ease-out timing. No infinite animations without user opt-in. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.
